data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- LogicGate/
data.description: LogicGate has introduced Config Newton, described as the first Agentic GRC Engineer globally. This unveiling was announced on 15-Apr-2026 by LogicGate via PR Newswire. The company has made a correction to the third paragraph in the news release, specifying that there have been "thousands of global implementations" instead of the previously stated "hundreds."

data.title: Bitcoin proposal aims to freeze stagnant coins to combat quantum threat, transitioning from original security system.
data.description: The plan aims to gradually replace the original security measures of Bitcoin and lock up coins that remain inactive for a certain period.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D Announces New International Board of Directors Leadership
data.description: During a time of significant scientific advancements in Type 1 Diabetes (T1D), Karen Shishino Jordan has been appointed as the Chair and Carlton McMillan as the Vice Chair. The organization, Breakthrough T1D, previously known as JDRF, which is a prominent global research and advocacy group focused on T1D, made this announcement in New York on April 15, 2026. The naming of Jordan and McMillan in these key roles comes as the organization pushes forward in its mission amidst groundbreaking developments in T1D research.

data.title: Duke Energy honors lineworkers who help strengthen grid, restore power
data.description: On April 18th, National Lineworker Appreciation Day is observed to recognize the dedication of the individuals who work tirelessly to ensure safety, service, and support for the communities they serve. These lineworkers play a crucial role in enhancing the reliability of the system and expedite the restoration process during power outages caused by severe weather. This day celebrates the hard work and commitment of these lineworkers in Charlotte, North Carolina, and across the nation. It serves as a tribute to their unwavering efforts in strengthening the infrastructure year-round, ensuring the smooth functioning of essential services.

data.title: NACS Foundation Launches Second Annual Search for “First Responder of the Year”
data.description: The NACS Foundation is currently accepting nominations for the First Responder of the Year award for the year 2026. This prestigious award aims to recognize the outstanding contributions of first responders and K9 officers who have demonstrated exceptional dedication to their roles. Individuals are encouraged to nominate individuals who have gone above and beyond in their service. Nominations can be submitted for consideration, and the selected recipient will be honored for their exemplary work.

data.title: 8 top AI models tested in sports betting with Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok. None made profit after a full Premier League season.
data.description: KellyBench recently conducted a study in which Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok were tested by placing bets on a full Premier League season. The results showed that none of the four entities were able to make a profit from their bets. This experiment sheds light on the challenges and limitations faced by automated betting systems, emphasizing the complexities involved in successfully predicting outcomes in sports.

data.title: GA Telesis Commences Disassembly of Two of the Youngest A320neo Aircraft Ever to Enter Teardown
data.description: Today, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, GA Telesis, LLC, a prominent company in commercial aviation and aerospace lifecycle solutions, revealed the start of disassembling two of the newest Airbus A320neo aircraft ever entered into a teardown program. This development signifies a significant shift in the industry, as the company handles the dismantling of these relatively young aircraft to manage their lifecycle effectively.

data.title: Construction Chemicals Market to Reach US$ 89.0 Billion by 2033 Expands Amid Infrastructure Growth and Sustainable Innovation
data.description: A recent report from Persistence Market Research, a well-known management consulting firm, provides insights into the construction chemicals market. These specific substances play a crucial role in improving the performance, durability, and sustainability of construction endeavors. The report offers valuable data and analysis on the market trends and growth projections. With a notable focus on enhancing construction project outcomes, these chemicals are witnessing a significant demand surge. London, April 15, 2026.
